theories.title: Iran-US Strait of Hormuz escalation spiral
theories.summary: US and Iran engaged in tit-for-tat strikes around Strait of Hormuz after Trump's Iran ceasefire collapsed, with Iran firing ballistic missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, and Jordan. Multiple sources indicate Trump is preparing for multi-day/week escalation as Qatar halts LNG production and tanker traffic stalls, creating cascading energy market shock.
theories.why_signal: Cross-economic, geopolitical, and market communities all tracking real-time escalation with mortgage rates already spiking and energy infrastructure decisions being halted in response.

posts.title: Return To War: Iran Fires Ballistic Missiles At Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Jordan, After US Struck 170 Iranian Targets

Mortgage rates jump as tensions with Iran spook bond investors

theories.title: Supreme Court shadow docket expanding secretive power
theories.summary: ProPublica reports that most Supreme Court rulings are now secretive emergency docket votes with minimal justification, marking a troubling milestone. Multiple legal analysis communities flagging this as constitutional power consolidation happening outside public scrutiny and debate.
theories.why_signal: Legal experts flagging this as structural institutional shift; coincides with yesterday's Supreme Court shadow docket theory gaining momentum with fresh ProPublica investigative reporting.

theories.title: AI cost spiral forcing enterprise throttling
theories.summary: Multiple tech and finance sources report companies like Amazon, Adobe, Atlassian, Citi are actively throttling employee AI use because token costs are spiraling out of control. Meta leaked memo shows 14 GW capacity doubling but price competition destroying unit economics.
theories.why_signal: This was yesterday's emerging theory (score 7) and is now surging with concrete leaked data and multi-company confirmation; signals structural AI economics problem at enterprise scale.

theories.title: Housing affordability collapse despite price gains
theories.summary: Paradoxical situation: home prices hitting all-time highs while existing home sales plummet to record lows, signaling total buyer withdrawal from market despite price availability improvements. Financial literacy crisis also hitting—only 5% of Americans pass basic financial test.
theories.why_signal: Multiple days of sustained coverage showing real disconnect between nominal asset prices and actual market participation; signals potential liquidity/demand destruction ahead.

theories.why_signal: Yesterday's theory (score 9) getting concrete reinforcement with primary results and organizational visibility; now documented as 300+ DSA-backed candidates with institutional backing.

theories.title: Leveraged ETF boom making stock market more volatile
theories.summary: Risky leveraged ETFs are booming in 2026 with traders actively seeking volatility as feature, not bug. Combined with momentum trade breakdown and low VIX hiding fierce undercurrents, signals structural instability in market positioning.
theories.why_signal: Financial community tracking increased retail/institutional risk-taking behavior; correlates with gold selloff and liquidity reset dynamics signaling market stress.

breaking_news.title: Graham Platner ends Maine Senate campaign
breaking_news.summary: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner suspended his campaign after losing support and financial backing following a Politico report that a woman said he forced her to have sex (which he denied).
breaking_news.why_notable: Opens major swing-state Senate seat just before filing deadline; signals Democratic establishment vulnerability and DSA-backed replacement machinery ready to activate.

breaking_news.title: Palm Beach International becomes Donald J. Trump International Airport: What to know
breaking_news.summary: Palm Beach International Airport officially changed its name to Donald J. Trump International Airport on Thursday.
breaking_news.why_notable: Latest in series of Trump renaming/branding actions; symbol of institutional capture and normalization of executive personal brand elevation.

breaking_news.title: A Puerto Rico Government Agency Exposed 1 Million Social Security Numbers
breaking_news.summary: Puerto Rico government agency exposed 1 million Social Security numbers in data breach.
breaking_news.why_notable: Large-scale identity theft vector; adds to pattern of government cybersecurity failures and surveillance infrastructure vulnerabilities.

breaking_news.title: Trump wants court to rehear birthright citizenship case
breaking_news.summary: Trump is asking the Supreme Court to rehear a birthright citizenship case.
breaking_news.why_notable: Signals continued aggressive constitutional interpretation push; could strip citizenship from millions if successful.

breaking_news.title: Top Legal Adviser to Joint Chiefs Is Stepping Down Nearly a Year Before Completing Term
breaking_news.summary: Top legal adviser to the Joint Chiefs of Staff is stepping down nearly a year before completing his term.
